data.title: Florida abolishes business rent tax, last in the US, in historic move for commercial real estate. Positively impacts economy.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, a significant development occurred in the commercial real estate industry as Florida made history by abolishing its business rent tax. This tax had been the only statewide tax on commercial leases in the country. The removal of this tax is expected to have a beneficial effect on the economy, opening up new opportunities for businesses and potentially stimulating growth. This decision marks a major milestone for the sector and is likely to have a positive impact on businesses operating in Florida.

data.title: SurgiBox gets CE Mark for SurgiField System to boost safe surgery access globally.	rectification for its SurgiField System, a portable, non-sterile field designed for surgical procedures in challenging environments. This accreditation sets the platform for the company’s international growth and sales boost.
data.description: SurgiBox, a medical technology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, shared on August 7, 2025, that it has obtained CE Certification. This certification enables the company to expand its presence globally and boost sales significantly. SurgiBox focuses on enhancing access to safe and sterile surgery wherever it is required. The CE Certification marks a critical milestone for the company, signaling its adherence to strict European standards. This achievement is expected to drive sales and pave the way for market expansion.

data.title: Wastewater treatment market booming, share expected to reach 55% by 2024 and projected to hit 80% by 2030, creating innovation opportunities.
data.description: By 2024, the proportion of treated wastewater is expected to surge from 20% to 55%, with a projected increase to 80% by 2030. This growth in the market presents a valuable opportunity for the implementation of advanced technologies and sustainable solutions. The report, dated August 7, 2025, from BCC highlights the potential for sectors involved in wastewater treatment to strategically capitalize on this trend.

data.title: Gray Media and Graham Media Group raise over $1.1 million for Texas flooding relief with help from 113 markets and two main stations.
data.description: In a collaborative effort, Gray Media and Graham Media Group have revealed that their initiative, Together for Texas, has raised over $1,104,000 for the Central Texas and Hill Country areas. This aid comes in response to the severe flooding experienced on July 4th. Following the tragic event, Gray stations spanning 113 markets along with Graham Media Group’s KSAT in San Antonio and KPRC in Houston, championed a fundraising campaign to assist The Salvation Army in providing relief to those impacted by the flooding.

data.title: Blue Bird gives 25 electric school buses to LRSD, Arkansas; Third-largest district with 40 schools, 19,000+ students.
data.description: 25 electric school buses are being delivered to Little Rock School District in Arkansas by Blue Bird Corporation (Nasdaq: BLBD), a notable provider of electric and low-emission school buses. This move signifies a shift towards cleaner student transportation for LRSD, which ranks as the third-largest school district in the state and caters to a student population exceeding 19,000 across 40 schools. The electric school buses belong to Blue Bird's advanced Vision electric school bus lineup.
Zealand Pharma will discuss Q2 2025 financial results in conference call on Aug 14, 2pm CET (8am ET).

data.title: Inventor from FL develops advanced home electrical panel (TLS-1037) in Pittsburgh to centralize home systems control.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 7, 2025, an inventor from Palmetto, Florida, expressed his vision of revolutionizing home management. He introduced an integrated electrical panel meant to centralize control over multiple home systems, moving beyond just electrical services. The panel aims to streamline the management of various systems within the house.
Vaisala Corp buys back shares on 7.8.2025.

data.title: Roth Staffing Companies named among largest office/clerical & direct hire firms in US in 2025 by SIA based on revenue.
data.description: In Orange, California on August 7, 2025, Roth Staffing Companies received accolades from Staffing Industry Analysts (SIA) for being listed among the top Largest Office/Clerical Staffing Firms and Largest Direct Hire Firms in the United States for the year 2025, determined by their revenue figures. Roth Staffing's notable achievements were recognized in the staff industry, highlighting their success in the sector.

data.title: Board members, executives, and associates of Novo Nordisk A/S disclosed share transactions under Regulation No. 596/2014.
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on August 7, 2025, a company announcement revealed details regarding transactions involving Novo Nordisk shares by board members, executives, and their affiliates. This disclosure complies with Article 19 of Regulation No. 596/2014, which addresses market abuse.

data.title: India's energy industry research report for 2025-2035 predicts renewables dominance, with a shift in energy supply mix, demanding smart investments and scalable technologies.
data.description: A report titled "India's Energy Future: Demand-supply Dynamics Amid Renewable Energy Growth & Energy Storage Revolution By 2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. By 2035, India's energy supply mix is forecasted to experience a notable change, with renewables and emerging energy sources taking the lead role. The country's transition towards clean energy is rapidly progressing and is a prevalent trend that requires strategic investments and scalable technologies to achieve success.
Putin met India's National Security Adviser Doval - RIA.

data.title: ConocoPhillips beat Q2 earnings estimates, reporting $2.0 billion profit, $1.56 per share, on $14.74 billion revenue. Total production rose to 2,391 MBOED, a 3% increase.
data.description: ConocoPhillips reported second-quarter 2025 earnings of $2.0 billion, or $1.56 per share, compared to $2.3 billion, or $1.98 per share, in the same quarter last year. Adjusted earnings were $1.8 billion, or $1.42 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.40. Revenue for the quarter stood at $14.74 billion, higher than the expected $14.63 billion. Total production rose to 2,391 MBOED, up by 446 MBOED from the previous year, with a 3% increase when adjusted for acquisitions and dispositions. Lower 48 output was at 1,508 MBOED, including 845 MBOED from the Permian, 408 MBOED from the Eagle Ford, and 205 MBOED from the Bakken. The average realized price fell by 19% to $45.77 per BOE from $56.56. The news indicates ConocoPhillips' performance amidst changing global energy market dynamics, managing to maintain profitability despite challenges.

data.title: WSCA appoints Matt Capalby as Industry Liaison in AZ, representing union-signatory heavy civil contractors. Capalby, a third-generation Arizona native and military veteran, brings over 30 years of experience in the industry.
data.description: In an announcement made today by the Western States Contractors Association, consultant Matt Capalby has been appointed as the Industry Liaison for WSCA in Arizona. In this new capacity, Capalby will act as the representative for union-signatory heavy civil contractors in Arizona, working on forging pivotal connections with transportation agencies and government figures. With over three decades of expertise in Arizona, Capalby, a third-generation Arizona local and military veteran, is well-positioned to fulfill this role effectively.

data.title: Deckard Technologies acquires AllTheRooms, enhancing short-term rental compliance services in San Diego.
data.description: A technology company based in San Diego, GovTech Deckard Technologies, has recently purchased the short-term rental analytics and data group, AllTheRooms. This move aims to enhance its short-term rental compliance services by incorporating AllTheRooms' expertise. The acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, with the merger of these two entities bringing valuable insights and capabilities to the table. This strategic decision is expected to streamline operations and potentially improve offerings in the short-term rental sector.

data.title: Maya Kaimal launches Chickpea Masala Burger exclusively at Sprouts in August with Actual Veggies.
data.description: A Chickpea Masala Burger will make its debut exclusively at Sprouts this August. Actual Veggies, a prominent CPG company recognized for its chef-inspired veggie burgers and vegetable-focused offerings, revealed their inaugural collaborative product. The Chickpea Masala Burger is set to hit shelves in New York on August 7, 2025. This unique burger marks a new venture for Actual Veggies and aims to cater to health-conscious consumers looking for flavorful vegetarian options.

data.title: Washington Trust named among RI's healthiest employers for 4th consecutive year by PBN, among 27 organizations selected.
data.description: A recent announcement from Westerly, R.I. stated that Washington Trust has received recognition for the fourth consecutive year, being named one of the healthiest employers in Rhode Island by Providence Business News. The bank was chosen as one of 27 organizations achieving this accolade in 2025.
